NorthView Acquisition Corporation Announces Receipt of Notice from Nasdaq Regarding Filing of Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, NorthView Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: NVAC) disclosed that it has been notified by Nasdaq about non-compliance due to the delay in filing its Form 10-Q for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. According to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1), companies listed are obligated to promptly submit all necessary periodic financial reports to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Failure to do so results in non-compliance with the regulation, as highlighted in the notice sent by Nasdaq to the company.

news.headline: Former DNI John Ratcliffe, a HXL Logic Board Member, nominated as CIA Director. Key Date: Dec. 11, 2024.
Equitable Bank in Canada reduces prime lending rate by 50 basis points to 5.45% from 5.95%.
news.summary: Today, Equitable Bank, known as Canada's Challenger Bank™, disclosed a reduction in its prime lending rate by 50 basis points, from 5.95% to 5.45%. This move comes as Equitable's subsidiary, Concentra Bank, also lowers its prime lending rate. This adjustment reflects a strategic decision by the bank to adjust its lending rates, aiming to provide more competitive offerings to customers.

news.headline: RA Capital Management closes $1.4B acquisition of Aliada Therapeutics by AbbVie, marking second significant buy from Raven incubator in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, RA Capital Management, LP announced the acquisition of another company from their Raven incubator, marking the second significant acquisition of the year. This acquisition is particularly noteworthy as it is the first time a company developed by Raven through a technology platform licensed from a major pharmaceutical company has been acquired. The transaction took place in Boston on December 11th, 2024.

news.headline: CHNW opens Abigail Court in Gresham, provides 75 affordable housing units via $6.6M Oregon grant amid student housing crisis.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, College Housing Northwest (CHNW) has unveiled Abigail Court, previously known as the Pony Soldier Inn, as an affordable housing community in Gresham. The student housing nonprofit has taken urgent action amidst the escalating student housing crisis. With a $6.6 million Project Turnkey grant from the Oregon Legislature, CHNW has transformed the property into 75 modern living spaces. This initiative aims to address the pressing need for affordable student housing in the region.

news.headline: TAT Tech inks $17M, 5-year MRO deal with North American cargo carrier to service APUs on Boeing 757 & 767 aircraft.
news.summary: TAT Technologies Ltd., a prominent provider of products and services for aviation and ground defense sectors, is set to handle the repair of APUs on Carrier's Boeing 757 and 767 aircraft. This operation is scheduled to take place in NETANYA, Israel. With its listings on TASE as TAT Tech and NASDAQ as TATT, the company continues to solidify its position as a key player in the industry. This move signifies a significant development within the aviation field, highlighting the expertise and capabilities of TAT Technologies Ltd.

news.headline: Global dry bulk shipping market to grow by USD 3.64 billion (2023-2028) driven by AI, growing at 4.09% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of AI on market dynamics, particularly in the global dry bulk shipping sector. Predictions indicate that the market is set to expand by approximately USD 3.64 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.09% during this period. This demonstrates the substantial growth potential and transformative power that AI technologies are bringing to the sector.

news.headline: Big development: McNally considers imposing additional sanctions on Russian oil.
Ormat Tech announces public offering of 3.7 million shares of common stock on behalf of ORIX Corp with no proceeds for Ormat.
news.summary: Today, in Reno, Nevada, a leading geothermal and renewable energy technology company, Ormat Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ORA), disclosed the start of an underwritten secondary offering. This offering comprises 3,700,000 shares of its common stock on behalf of ORIX Corporation. Notably, Ormat will not be offering any of its common stock in this offering, and it will not receive any proceeds from the sale of the shares by the selling stockholder.

news.headline: Itron celebrates 50th Temetra deployment in Australia, aiding Aqwest in managing mechanical meters efficiently.
news.summary: Itron's Temetra solution has empowered Aqwest to efficiently oversee its current mechanical meters, thereby improving operations and maximizing effectiveness.

news.headline: Heparin market to grow by $3.34 billion (2024-2028) due to AI impact, coagulation disorder prevalence - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report discusses the impact of AI on the market, highlighting the projected growth of the global heparin market. According to Technavio, the market is expected to increase by USD 3.34 billion between 2024 and 2028. The report forecasts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.22% during this period.

news.headline: Nasdaq surpasses 20,000; Tesla hits record high; Adobe reports strong earnings. Titans like Google lead the surge.
news.summary: The Nasdaq index saw a significant rise, surpassing the 20,000 mark, driven by impressive performances from Tesla, Google, and other major companies. Adobe also made headlines with its late earnings release. Additionally, the Dow Jones Futures market showed positive signs as the Nasdaq achieved this milestone and Tesla reached a new record high, solidifying the dominance of these industry giants.
